Short Description: Filet Mignon Steak with a Wild Mushroom Sauce and Honey Glazed Rainbow Carrots and Rosemary Garlic Baby Potatoes
Long Description: Filet mignon steak dry brined and crusted with thyme, garlic, and black pepper, finished with a rich wild mushroom sauce of cremini and shiitake, served with honey glazed rainbow carrots and rosemary garlic baby potatoes for a refined, steakhouse inspired plate with a deeply savory finish.

Short Description: Blackened Chicken with a Honey Sriracha Glaze and Charred Broccoli and Roasted Bell Peppers over Basmati Rice
Long Description: Bold blackened chicken finished with a sweet and spicy honey sriracha glaze, served with charred broccoli and roasted bell peppers over fluffy basmati rice for a balanced sweet heat plate with a fresh, vibrant finish.

Dish Name: Lemon Herb Chicken with Whipped Feta
Short Description: Pan Roasted Chicken Breast with a Whipped Lemon Garlic Feta and Charred Sweet Potato, Roasted Broccoli, House Pickled Vegetables, and Dried Cranberries
Long Description: Lemon and herb marinated pan roasted chicken breast finished with a bright herb oil, served over a whipped lemon garlic feta with charred sweet potato, roasted broccoli, house pickled vegetables, and dried cranberries for a clean, Mediterranean inspired plate with a fresh, citrus finish.

Short Description: Pear Marinated Flank Steak with a House Gochujang Sauce and Roasted Zucchini, Sautéed Shiitake Mushrooms, and Pickled Cucumber over Calrose Rice
Long Description: Pear marinated flank steak roasted at high heat and sliced thin against the grain, finished with a house gochujang sauce, served over short grain calrose rice with roasted zucchini, sautéed shiitake mushrooms, and quick pickled cucumber for a savory, Korean inspired plate with a balanced umami finish.

Short Description: Pan Seared Salmon with a Lemon Caper Dill Sauce and Roasted Broccoli and Roasted Beets over Lemon Herb Quinoa
Long Description: Pan seared salmon finished with a bright lemon caper dill sauce, served with roasted broccoli and roasted beets over fluffy lemon herb quinoa for a clean, Mediterranean inspired plate with a bright, herbaceous finish.

Short Description: Honey Chipotle Shrimp with a Tahini Green Goddess Dressing and Charred Corn and Charred Broccoli over Cilantro Lime Rice
Long Description: Honey chipotle marinated shrimp seared and finished with a creamy tahini green goddess dressing, served with charred corn and charred broccoli over bright cilantro lime rice for a smoky, sweet heat plate with a fresh, herbaceous finish.

Short Description: Hot Honey Chicken Breast with a Hot Honey Sauce over Creamy Mac and Cheese
Long Description: Tender hot honey marinated chicken breast finished with a sweet and spicy hot honey sauce, served over rich and creamy mac and cheese for an indulgent, comfort forward plate with a bold, sweet heat finish.

Short Description: Oven Roasted Tofu in a Thai Coconut Curry with Roasted Bell Peppers and Roasted Broccoli over Jasmine Rice
Long Description: Oven roasted tofu in a rich Thai coconut curry, served with roasted bell peppers and roasted broccoli over fluffy jasmine rice with shredded purple cabbage and pickled red onion for a warm, fragrant plate with a creamy, aromatic finish.

Short Description: Our golden high protein and collagen rich turmeric and coconut milk bone broth slow simmered for 24 hours
Long Description: Our golden turmeric and coconut milk bone broth slow simmered for 24 hours with fresh ginger and warming spices.

Short Description: Tiramisu chia pudding with a sweet tiramisu style cream topped with a light cocoa dusting
Long Description: Creamy vanilla chia pudding layered with a lightly sweet tiramisu style cream, finished with a light cocoa dusting for a rich, dessert inspired treat.
